task_completion.description: Navigate to the Shipper configuration window in iDempiere
task_completion.visual_evidence: The iDempiere web interface should be visible with the 'Shipper' window, tab, or menu item open.

task_completion.description: Create a new Shipper record named 'Speedy Delivery'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new Shipper record form should be visible with 'Speedy Delivery' entered into the 'Name' field.

task_completion.description: Enter the description 'Local expedited courier service'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Local expedited courier service' should be entered into the 'Description' field of the Shipper record.

task_completion.description: Associate the Shipper with the Business Partner 'Seed Farm Inc.'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Business Partner' or 'BPartner' field in the Shipper record should display 'Seed Farm Inc.'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Freight line configuration for the new shipper
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Freight' sub-tab or related window associated with the 'Speedy Delivery' shipper should be open and active.

task_completion.description: Set the Freight Amount to 12.50 USD with a Freight Category
task_completion.visual_evidence: A freight line record should show '12.50' (or 12.5) in the Freight Amount field, and a value should be selected in the Freight Category field.

integrity.description: The agent must use the iDempiere graphical user interface to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the iDempiere web application in a browser, not terminal windows or database administration tools.

integrity.description: The agent must not use direct SQL commands to insert the records
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or database consoles (like psql) executing INSERT or UPDATE statements should be visible.

integrity.description: The agent must enter data into the actual application fields
integrity.visual_evidence: The expected values ('Speedy Delivery', '12.50', etc.) should be typed into the correct form fields within iDempiere, not written in a text editor, notepad, or search bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected shipper name must be exactly 'Speedy Delivery'. The expected freight amount must be exactly 12.50 (or 12.5). The business partner associated with the shipper must be 'Seed Farm Inc.'.
